title: Trump Says He’s Talking With Iran. Iran Says He’s Not. Here’s Why.
summary_full: The president has domestic and international political motivations for touting negotiations to end the war. Iran has similar ones to deny discussions.
summary_public: The president has domestic and international political motivations for touting negotiations to end the war. Iran has similar ones to deny discussions.
